reason: Modifying the pam_pwquality ucredit parameter enforces uppercase characters in passwords, a standard password complexity hardening step. It does not alter authentication mechanisms, services, or boot configuration, and only affects password validation at next change, posing minimal risk of lockout.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Existing passwords lacking uppercase characters will fail complexity checks on next password change; If applied to service or system accounts with static passwords, authentication could fail
